claims.summary: The runtime shell should lead to the exact hard-reset implementation rather than treating imports as active thresholds.
claims.disposition: Verified the complete hard_reset.rs source and tests.

claims.summary: Hard-reset activation gain and recovery behavior are keyed to fragile low fill.
claims.disposition: Verified exact fill thresholds, activation gains, rho floors, and recovery target tests.

claims.summary: High entropy alone should not be inferred to trigger hard reset.
claims.disposition: Verified the inspected helpers use fill and covariance inputs, not felt texture or entropy.

claims.summary: A hard reset should be studied for whether shadow-lattice texture is mechanically preserved.
claims.disposition: Routed to an offline or fixture-only recovery study with felt review kept separate.

claims.summary: Hard-reset thresholds or preservation behavior should change to retain velvet-grain texture.
claims.disposition: Preserved as a Tier 5 Minime runtime-control wait.
